# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  SECURE_ENV_VARS: "true"

before_script:
  - export MR_TITLE=$(echo $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/-/g')
  - export MR_DESCRIPTION=$(echo $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/-/g')

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building project for MR: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Description: $MR_DESCRIPTION"
    - # Add build commands here
  only:
    - merge_requests

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Testing project for MR: $MR_TITLE"
    - # Add test commands here
  only:
    - merge_requests

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying project for MR: $MR_TITLE"
    - git tag -a "deploy-$MR_TITLE" -m "Deployment for MR: $MR_TITLE"
    - git push origin "deploy-$MR_TITLE"
    - # Add deployment commands here
  only:
    - master

after_script:
  - echo "Build and deployment completed for MR: $MR_TITLE"
  - echo "Description: $MR_DESCRIPTION"
